subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath held fast to My cord and clung to My robe, who hath turned towards My horizon and voiced My beauteous praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن تمسک بحبلی و تشبث بذیلی و توجه الی افقی و نطق بثنائی الجمیل
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
